facts.text: Chronic low back pain for ~6 years, dull ache across the beltline, currently 3/10, climbing to 5-6/10 some evenings
facts.transcript_quote: Same one, going on six years now. A dull ache right across the beltline... Today it is about a three out of ten. Some evenings it climbs to a five or six.

facts.text: Back pain worse with prolonged sitting at computer and carrying laundry up three flights of stairs
facts.transcript_quote: Worse after I sit at the computer doing applications all day, or when I haul the laundry up to the third floor.

facts.text: Back pain relieved by stretching and heat
facts.transcript_quote: Stretching helps some. Heat helps more.

facts.text: Denies numbness, tingling, or weakness in legs; denies bladder or bowel dysfunction
facts.transcript_quote: No, none of that. It stays in the back.

facts.text: Office blood pressure 106/67 mmHg
facts.transcript_quote: Your pressure here in the office is actually fine — one-oh-six over sixty-seven

facts.text: Home blood pressure readings run high, ~150s systolic most mornings
facts.transcript_quote: My wife's machine says one-fifty-something most mornings.

facts.text: Previously diagnosed hypertension went untreated; patient never started prescribed pills due to cost/insurance change
facts.transcript_quote: the blood pressure problem we diagnosed a while back never actually got treated... The pharmacy said it would be forty bucks and I just... left it on the counter.

facts.text: Started lisinopril 10 mg oral tablet once daily in the morning for hypertension
facts.transcript_quote: lisinopril ten milligrams once a day

facts.text: Started amlodipine 2.5 mg oral tablet once daily in the morning for hypertension
facts.transcript_quote: amlodipine two and a half milligrams once a day

facts.text: Started hydrochlorothiazide 25 mg oral tablet once daily in the morning for hypertension
facts.transcript_quote: hydrochlorothiazide twenty-five milligrams in the morning — that last one is a water pill

facts.text: Started acetaminophen (Tylenol) 325 mg oral tablet every 4-6 hours, scheduled, for back pain
facts.transcript_quote: scheduled acetaminophen — plain Tylenol, the three-hundred-twenty-five-milligram tablets I am sending to the pharmacy

facts.text: Counseled to report dizziness, lightheadedness, dry cough, or ankle swelling from new BP medications
facts.transcript_quote: If you get dizzy, lightheaded, a nagging dry cough, or ankle swelling, call me

facts.text: Counseled on non-pharmacologic back care: walking, stretching, avoiding prolonged sitting, standing every 30 minutes using a timer
facts.transcript_quote: the real medicine is movement: walking, the stretches we went over years ago, and no marathon sitting. Set a timer, stand up every half hour

facts.text: Unemployed since April due to warehouse shift being cut; job searching, financial strain
facts.transcript_quote: the warehouse cut my whole shift in April, so I am out of work. I have been applying everywhere, nothing yet. Money is tight

facts.text: Poor housing conditions: broken air conditioning (reached 95°F), leak with mold growth under kitchen sink, broken elevator requiring three flights of stairs; unresponsive landlord
facts.transcript_quote: The air conditioning has been dead three weeks — it hit ninety-five in there last weekend. There is a leak under the kitchen sink growing something I do not want to name, and the elevator has been broken

facts.text: Provided tenant rights packet and county housing hotline information from front office
facts.transcript_quote: Our front office keeps a packet on tenant rights and the county housing hotline. I am having them print it for you

facts.text: Reports job-loss stress with early morning waking (4 a.m.), but not falling apart; family working and covering rent
facts.transcript_quote: I am stressed, I will not lie. I wake up at four some mornings doing math in my head. But I am not falling apart.

facts.text: GAD-7 anxiety screen score of 1 (minimal), consistent with stress rather than anxiety disorder
facts.transcript_quote: you scored a one, which is minimal, and that matches how you describe it. Stress, not an anxiety disorder.

facts.text: Counseled to report early if stress worsens to nightly waking or mood declines
facts.transcript_quote: If the four a.m. math sessions become every night, or the mood starts sinking, I want to hear about it early, not late.

facts.text: AUDIT-C score of 1, minimal alcohol use (a beer on Sundays)
facts.transcript_quote: an AUDIT-C of one, no concern at all

facts.text: Ex-smoker, quit approximately 20 years ago
facts.transcript_quote: Almost twenty years quit.

facts.text: Gingivitis: red, swollen lower gum line that bleeds with light touch
facts.transcript_quote: The gum line along the bottom teeth is red and swollen, and it bleeds with just a light touch. That is gingivitis.

facts.text: Referral placed to dental clinic (sliding-scale) for gingivitis cleaning and home care
facts.transcript_quote: I am putting in a referral to the dental clinic; they run a sliding-scale fee

facts.text: Administered trivalent split-virus influenza vaccine, left arm
facts.transcript_quote: flu shot. You are due, and it costs you nothing with the visit.

facts.text: Follow-up in 4-6 weeks with home blood pressure log to monitor new medications

slots.purpose: review home BP log, assess BP meds

facts.transcript_quote: I want you back in four to six weeks with the home blood pressure log so we can watch the new pills work.

facts.text: BMI 29.31 kg/m2 (height 162.1 cm, weight 77 kg)
Heart rate 86 /min, respiratory rate 14 /min
PRAPARE screening: worried about losing housing, unable to afford utilities in past year; has housing; feels safe; income ~$118,890/yr; private insurance; 4 people in household; high school education
Medication review completed; patient had run out of all medications and stopped refilling after insurance switched to wife's plan
facts.transcript_quote: I ran out of everything months ago and stopped refilling when the insurance switched over to my wife's plan.

facts.text: Assessment of health and social care needs completed

slots.procedure: assessment of health and social care needs

presence.note_evidence: Chronic low back pain, present about six years, is a dull ache across the beltline, currently 3/10 and up to 5-6/10 by evening
aggravated by prolonged sitting during job applications and by carrying laundry up three flights of stairs
improved with stretching and heat
He denies radicular pain, numbness, tingling, weakness, and bowel or bladder dysfunction.
BP 106/67 mmHg
home systolic readings in the 150s on his wife's monitor
Essential hypertension was diagnosed previously but medication was never started after an insurance change and job loss
Start lisinopril 10 mg daily
amlodipine 2.5 mg daily
hydrochlorothiazide 25 mg daily — low-dose combination taken together each morning
Acetaminophen 325 mg oral tablets (Tylenol) prescribed for scheduled rather than crisis use
presence.rationale: Drug/dose/scheduled present but every 4-6 hours frequency not stated.

presence.note_evidence: Counseled on dizziness, dry cough, and ankle swelling
Activity prescription: daily walking, previously taught stretches, standing breaks every 30 minutes during computer work
laid off from warehouse work in April and is actively job hunting; he describes financial strain

air conditioning nonfunctional for three weeks with indoor heat to 95 degrees, an unrepaired leak with suspected mold under the kitchen sink, a chronically broken elevator, and an unresponsive landlord
Tenant-rights and county housing hotline resource packet provided at checkout
early-morning waking with rumination a few times weekly, but preserved mood, appetite, energy, and day-to-day functioning
presence.rationale: Job-loss stress with early waking, preserved functioning documented.

presence.note_evidence: GAD-7 1, consistent with situational stress rather than an anxiety disorder
Return earlier if sleep disruption becomes nightly or mood declines
AUDIT-C 1
presence.rationale: AUDIT-C score and low alcohol use documented.

presence.note_evidence: Ex-smoker since his late teens
presence.rationale: Ex-smoker status with quit timeframe roughly matching documented.

presence.note_evidence: Mandibular gingiva erythematous and edematous with bleeding on light contact
Patient referral for dental care placed to sliding-scale dental clinic
Influenza vaccine (split virus, trivalent, preservative-free) administered
presence.rationale: Vaccine documented but injection site (left arm) not stated.

presence.note_evidence: Return in 4-6 weeks with the log to titrate
weight 77 kg, height 162.1 cm, BMI 29.31 kg/m2
HR 86/min, RR 14/min

presence.rationale: PRAPARE instrument and specifics (income, insurance, education) not documented.

presence.note_evidence: Medication review due; no current medications after prior prescriptions lapsed
presence.rationale: Lapsed meds noted but review 'due' not completed and wife's-plan detail absent.

presence.note_evidence: assessment of health and social care needs completed
